final_acceptance_policy: Stage-local PASS does not imply linked AC-* PASS; final oracles remain NOT_RUN or PARTIAL until their owning stages and final review.

acceptance_contracts.title: 公开项目和包骨架
acceptance_contracts.environment: local dedicated worktree; no remote write
acceptance_contracts.input: frozen Stage 0 manifest plus Stage 1 additions
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Implementation, tests, contracts and evidence are under the public project path except the single repository-root CI workflow; the Stage 0 package selection remains byte-identical.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: required paths 100%; frozen manifest mismatches 0; remote writes 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Remove the out-of-scope artifact and keep Stage 1 open.

acceptance_contracts.title: Actions-only CLI 和纯函数边界
acceptance_contracts.oracle: All seven commands exist, reject non-Actions and non-synthetic execution, and expose no credential or production endpoint option.
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable the CLI entry point and repair the boundary.

acceptance_contracts.title: 确定性 RFC EML 与 Abuse Fixture
acceptance_contracts.input: MIME, RAW, metadata, authentication and abuse fixture factory
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Repeated generation is byte-identical; base64url decoding reproduces RAW; target, unrelated, spoofed and abuse classes are represented without real data.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: fixture determinism 100%; real messages 0; unsafe parser execution 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Reject the fixture set and do not proceed to archive tests.

acceptance_contracts.title: 官方 age 合成恢复 Skeleton
acceptance_contracts.environment: official age CLI, ephemeral synthetic identity, in-memory ciphertext store
acceptance_contracts.input: one verified and two rejected synthetic messages
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Only the verified fixture is RAW-fetched; age ciphertext alone reaches the in-memory remote; recovered bytes exactly equal canonical RAW; public evidence is redacted and production gates are NOT_RUN.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: verified RAW round-trip 100%; rejected RAW fetches 0; plaintext remote objects 0; external writes 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Fail Stage 1; retain every production and mutation capability as absent.

acceptance_contracts.title: JSON Schema 与 Pandera 契约
acceptance_contracts.input: Message, Document, Transaction, Timeline, Lineage and Evidence valid/invalid samples
acceptance_contracts.oracle: All six JSON contracts accept valid and reject invalid values; the Pandera transaction contract accepts a valid frame and rejects schema drift.
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block packaging and repair the versioned contract.

acceptance_contracts.title: 只读任务包和仓库验证器
acceptance_contracts.environment: current public tree and pinned external Governance checkout
acceptance_contracts.input: frozen baseline, task DAG, traceability, Stage 1 overlay and prohibitions
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The validator is read-only, checks unique requirements and acceptances, acyclic dependencies, complete traceability, frozen baseline integrity, Stage 1 evidence and prohibitions.
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Treat Stage 1 as BLOCKED and preserve the last verified commit.

acceptance_contracts.title: 无 Secret 公共基础 CI
acceptance_contracts.input: repository-root workflow and direct dependency pins
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The workflow has read-only permissions, immutable Action SHAs, no schedule, cache, artifact, secret reference, self-hosted runner or production command, and runs lint, type, unit, schema, package, dual-plane and publication gates.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: unpinned Actions 0; secret references 0; required gate families 7/7
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Do not publish the workflow; repair CI and rerun all Stage 1 gates.
